description: Create a Portal Note titled 'Spring Science Fair' in OpenSIS to inform families about an upcoming event. Use the body text: 'Registration for the annual Science Fair is now open. Please pick up forms from the main office by Friday.' Set the start date to today and the end date to one month from today. Ensure the announcement is visible only to Students and Parents, excluding Teachers and Admins. Use credentials admin/Admin@123.

metadata.expected_body_content: Registration for the annual Science Fair is now open
